policy_statement: segment_id is annotation scope only and not part of raw measurement identity
Segment assignment must not alter RAW CLEAN DERIVED row identity keys file_id plus row_index
Segment assignment must be reproducible from documented source class and policy version
Allowed source classes are algorithmic_ramp metadata_label curated_registry hybrid and placeholder_not_implemented_preimplementation_only
segment_type must be one of zfc fcc fcw increasing_T decreasing_T constant_T unknown
segment_direction field is required and must use increasing_T decreasing_T constant_T unknown
ZFC FCC FCW labels require metadata/header evidence or curated registry evidence
Ramp direction alone cannot infer zfc fcc fcw labels
segment_type unknown must not be promoted to zfc fcc fcw
Comparison outputs require overlapping T_K support
Comparison outputs require declared minimum overlap fraction threshold
Comparison outputs require declared minimum overlap-point count
Comparison outputs require same or compatible H_Oe scope
Comparison outputs require same sample/file context or explicit pairing policy
Comparison outputs require declared method and declared binning/interpolation policy reference
No interpolation regridding or implicit alignment unless separately approved interpolation policy exists
Unknown segments may support coverage diagnostics only and not ZFC/FCC/FCW comparison metrics
ZFC FCC FCW comparison outputs remain diagnostic candidate only and not physics claims
